name: rad-tailwind
description: RAD Tailwind — comprehensive Tailwind CSS coding standards, architectural guidance, and anti-pattern enforcement. Covers the utility-first mental model, CSS-first configuration with @theme, class ordering conventions, design tokens, mobile-first responsive design, container queries, multi-variant component patterns (CVA, tailwind-merge, cn()), dark mode and theming, v3→v4 migration, production optimization, and accessibility requirements. Built from curated sources including official Tailwind CSS docs, migration guides, Steve Kinney's Tailwind course, and production case studies.
